positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical circular wreath composition featuring bioluminescent flora and stylized constellations. The main elements include glowing deep indigo leaves, crescent moon phases, minimalist geometric star maps, and subtle glowing orbs. The overall aesthetic is clean psychedelic neo-art deco combined with ethereal cosmic elements. Use extreme black and rich jewel-toned indigo, vibrant teal, and warm gold accents. The composition must have a central focus, strong contrast, and clear silhouettes suitable for screen printing on fabric. Studio lighting setup, ultra-high detail, vector art quality.
